_comment: NOCK-side supply snapshot for the testnet conservation dashboard. The Cloudflare Worker cannot reach the local fakenet node directly, so the Nockchain-side figures are refreshed out-of-band by scripts/bridge-conservation-audit.sh (or a node-connected cron that POSTs them). The Base-side figures (tNOCK supply, deposits, mints) are read live. Units are nicks; 65,536 nicks = 1 NOCK; fakenet coinbase is a constant 2^32 nicks = 65,536 NOCK/block.
